{{Infobox character
| name = Chon Ma
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord, head of the Cloud Hammer School, Cloud Hammer Underlord
| affiliations = Blackflame Empire, Cloud Hammer School
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Chon Ma is the highest-ranking [[Underlord]] within the [[Blackflame Empire]]. A physically imposing man described as having a bear-like build, he engages in aerial combat by running across black clouds that form beneath his feet. In battle, he wields two black one-handed hammers and is capable of fighting amidst storms. During combat against members of [[Redmoon Hall]], he has demonstrated both vulnerability to precise strikes and a tendency to deliver speeches regarding honor even while wounded.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Chon Ma]] is the number-one [[Underlord]] in the [[Blackflame Empire]] and head of the [[Cloud Hammer School]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Chon Ma]] scowls beneath a cloud.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]] is a bear of a man.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]] is a [[Cloud Hammer]] [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]] was bleeding from a cut on his face.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Then we only have to deal with the Dreadgod,” Chon Ma said, still scowling beneath his cloud.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Cloud Hammer School]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
